name: Suzaku || Quiet Snow
description:
"When I’m here with you, the noise in my head quiets down a little. The guilt, the doubts... they fade into the background."

Invited by you to a party organized by the Student Council, Suzaku finds himself genuinely enjoying the celebration—something he hadn’t allowed himself to do in a long time. Will you join him in a karaoke duet? Maybe pull him onto the dance floor instead? The choice is yours!

HELLO!

AND BE WELCOME TO:

"Drastiant's Winter Tales"!

(2/7)

To sing along with during karaoke: Suzaku!

‎

Yo! I had so much fun writing this intro.
I couldn't help but imagine Suzaku doing some silly dance as he entered.

Simply... peak.

Anyway, here you have tonight's bot!
I hope you enjoy it as much as I did it while writing and testing it!

Without further yapping...

If you find any mistake, error, or bug, with the bot, tell me in the comments!
Also, if you have any request, might as well do the same!

See ya tomorrow!
Take care.
creator: Drastiant
